summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Agile Ortho iteration 23 features: DB cleanup (905→817 products), Trauma→Orthopedics merge, brochure image extraction pipeline, product image display, and Key Features bug fix. All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.

backend_api: GET /api/products - returns products with images array
GET /api/products/{id} - technical_specifications is object not string
GET /api/admin/products - returns products with images field
GET /api/admin/products - shows image thumbnails for products with images
frontend_ui: Products page shows 11 division filters (no Trauma)
Products listing shows actual product images (not just placeholders)
Cardiovascular division shows 8+ products with images
Product detail page shows product image when available
Product detail page shows placeholder when no image
Key Features section displays correctly (no character-by-character bug)
Specifications tab shows proper table format
Admin Products page loads with product list
Products table shows Images column with counts

critical_code_review_comments: Key Features bug fix correctly implemented - technical_specifications checked as object before Object.entries
Product images properly served via /api/files/{storage_path} endpoint
Division filter correctly shows 11 divisions after Trauma merge
Brochure extraction endpoints properly protected with admin_required dependency
Image display uses lazy loading for performance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 verified: 1) DB cleanup reduced products from 905 to 817, 2) Trauma division merged into Orthopedics (now 311 products), 3) Brochure image extraction pipeline working - 204 products have images, 4) Cardiovascular division has most products with images, 5) Key Features bug fixed - technical_specifications properly handled as object, 6) Admin products page has Extract from Brochures button. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration23_features.py

verified_features.trauma_merge: Trauma division merged into Orthopedics (311 products)
verified_features.brochure_extraction: 204 products have images from brochure extraction
verified_features.image_display: Products listing and detail pages show actual images
verified_features.admin_extraction_button: Extract from Brochures button present in admin
